news.summary: Meril Life Sciences, based in VAPI, India, recently revealed one-year results from the pivotal LANDMARK trial, showcasing the performance and safety of their Next Gen Myval THV series. This head-to-head TAVI trial marks a significant milestone, emphasizing the effectiveness of the THV series. The results were presented at a prestigious Late-Breaking Trial event. The trial is the first of its kind and the numbers presented reinforce the positive outcomes observed.
news.headline: Meril presents successful one-year results of LANDMARK trial at EuroPCR 2025, reinforcing performance and safety of Myval THV series.

news.summary: Based in Uppsala, Sweden, on May 22, 2025, MAGic BioProcessing (Lab-on-a-Bead AB) has excitedly revealed the selection of Jonathan Royce to its Board of Directors. Bringing with him an impressive 25 years of experience in the life sciences industry, Jonathan has held various executive positions.
news.headline: MAGic BioProcessing (Lab-on-a-Bead AB) appoints Jonathan Royce, a seasoned C-suite leader with 25+ years experience, to its Board of Directors.

The value of Bitcoin surged past $110,000. A new formidable competitor to Tesla is set to be revealed. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Knox Systems announced its support for the Department of Defense's Software Fast Track (SWFT) initiative. Knox Systems is the provider of the largest and longest-running FedRAMP and DISA-authorized SaaS cloud in the federal market. This initiative aims to revolutionize the software procurement process. Washington and New York-based Knox Systems is a key player in this endeavor, underscoring its commitment to innovation and government partnerships.
news.headline: Knox Systems supports DoD's SWFT initiative to fast-track secure software. Largest FedRAMP and DISA-authorized SaaS cloud.

Mr. Parker's appointment brings a wealth of experience from both the public and private sectors to Southland. With close to twenty years of legislative involvement and a strong background in the private industry, Mr. Parker is set to enhance the operations of Southland Holdings, a prominent provider of specialized infrastructure construction services.
news.headline: Tan Parker joins Southland Holdings' Board of Directors on May 19, 2025, bringing 20 years of combined public and private sector expertise.

news.summary: A new hormone replacement therapy (HRT) option is now accessible through Eden's platform in the majority of U.S. states. This program offers estradiol cream, patches, and compounded progesterone under clinical supervision. Eden, a prominent health platform that links individuals with licensed healthcare providers, launched this service. The rollout began on May 22, 2025, from Denver.
news.headline: Eden now offers female hormone therapy via telehealth in most U.S. states, providing access to estradiol cream, patches, and compounded progesterone.

news.summary: An experienced individual specializing in franchise and investment banking has been added to the board, enhancing its expertise in these areas. This addition brings valuable knowledge and skills to the board, contributing to its overall strength and proficiency.
news.headline: Franchise and investment banking expert Christopher M. Grandpre elected as director at The Joint Corp.

news.summary: Accelsius, a prominent company specializing in two-phase, direct-to-chip liquid cooling solutions, has been chosen as a significant participant in a project funded by the U.S. Department of Energy's ARPA-E COOLERCHIPS initiative. This project is under the leadership of Professor Dereje Agonafer, a distinguished member of the National Academy of Engineering and a Presidential Distinguished Professor at The University of Texas at Arlington. The initiative, titled "Holistic Co-Design of Novel Hybrid Cooling Technology for the Data Center of the Future," aims to develop advanced cooling technology for next-generation data centers.
news.headline: Accelsius partners with ARPA-E COOLERCHIPS project to advance cooling tech for future data centers. Led by Professor Agonafer from University of Texas, project to develop hybrid cooling technology for data centers.

news.summary: A summit focusing on Agentic AI, organized by Checkmarx in Paramus, New Jersey, is set to take place. This summit aims to address the vision of autonomous application security (AppSec) to reduce risks, accelerate the delivery process, and address vulnerabilities promptly as they emerge. Checkmarx is taking the lead in championing this initiative to enhance cybersecurity practices and promote efficient software development processes.
news.headline: Checkmarx to showcase autonomous AppSec vision at Agentic AI Summit to reduce risk and fix vulnerabilities in real-time.

news.summary: In New York, GEM Token Fund ISA Ltd. reported completing its initial transaction, a $100 million token purchase agreement with MoviePass Inc. and C3 Foundation. This collaboration aims to boost the advancement of Mogul, a groundbreaking daily fantasy entertainment platform designed for Hollywood. Mogul, unveiled in beta recently, enables enthusiasts to engage in the entertainment industry.
news.headline: GEM Token Fund invests $100M in MoviePass for debut of Mogul - Hollywood's first daily fantasy platform.

news.summary: The global roll lifting equipment market is currently valued at approximately $5.2 billion in 2024, with projections to reach around $8.7 billion by 2034. The market is expected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.2% from 2025 to 2034, driven by increasing demand in sectors such as construction, manufacturing, and logistics. Technological innovations, including IoT integration and smart systems, are enhancing equipment efficiency and reducing operational downtime. Despite favorable trends, challenges such as stringent regulatory standards, volatile raw material prices, and the push for sustainability exist. Companies focusing on smart, sustainable, and safe lifting solutions are well-positioned in this evolving market. The market drivers include a focus on workplace safety, technological innovation, regulatory frameworks, and macroeconomic factors. The market is segmented by product type (Electric Roll Manipulators, Manual Roll Manipulators, Support Roller Lifts, and other variants) and application (Industrial Sector, Commercial Applications, and others). The Americas lead the market, followed by APAC, Europe, and the Middle East & Africa. Challenges include raw material price volatility, supply chain disruptions, intensifying competition, and regulatory compliance. Overall, the industry is experiencing strong growth driven by safety initiatives, technological advancements, regulatory pressures, and economic recovery, positioning it for sustained growth over the next decade.
news.headline: Global roll lifting equipment market valued at $5.2 billion in 2024, projected to reach $8.7 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 5.2%. Technological advancements like IoT contribute to growth. Companies face challenges like stringent regulations, volatile raw material prices, and the need for sustainability. Market driven by factors like workplace safety, technological innovation, and regulatory frameworks. Market segmented by product type and application, with regions like Americas and APAC showing strong growth. Challenges include raw material price volatility, supply chain disruptions, competition, and regulatory compliance.

news.summary: The total revenue for the year reached $1.0768 billion, marking an 18% growth compared to the previous year. In the quarter, total revenue amounted to $253.4 million, representing a 10% increase year-over-year. The gross margin saw improvement, reaching 44%, with the gross profit seeing a 12% increase from the previous year. The monthly ARPU (Average Revenue Per User) grew by 13% year-over-year, reaching approximately $489.
news.headline: Lightspeed reports $1.08B total revenue in 2025 with 18% YoY growth, $253.4M in Q4 revenue, 10% YoY increase. Gross margin up to 44%. Monthly ARPU at ~$489, grew 13% YoY.

news.summary: Two Prime and MARA have enhanced their partnership to capitalize on risk-adjusted returns from bitcoin, reflecting a growing trend of corporate treasuries turning to managed BTC strategies for yield. The collaboration was solidified in Asheville, North Carolina on May 22, 2025. Two Prime, an SEC-registered advisor on bitcoin investments, is leading the initiative. This move signifies a shift in the approach to seeking returns on investments within the crypto space.
news.headline: MARA partners with Two Prime to invest 500 BTC for yield strategy, targeting corporate treasuries seeking managed BTC returns.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on May 22, 2025, The Cato Corporation (NYSE: CATO) released their financial results for the first quarter ending on May 3, 2025. The company reported a net income of $3.3 million, equivalent to $0.17 per diluted share. This figure marks a decrease from the previous year's first quarter net income of $11.0 million, amounting to $0.54 per diluted share.
news.headline: Cato Corp reported 1Q earnings: $3.3M net income, $0.17 per share, compared to $11M, $0.54 per share last year.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Stealth Partner Group, a subsidiary of Amwins and a leading stop-loss general agency, unveiled its latest State of the Market report. This report delves into current trends in healthcare and employer stop-loss, offering valuable insights. This comprehensive analysis includes key data on market intelligence.
news.headline: Stealth Partner Group, an Amwins company, releases 2025 State of the Market Report with in-depth healthcare and employer stop-loss trends.

news.summary: Felder's leadership role at Smoothie King is expanding as he remains CFO, guiding the brand into a new era of growth. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025, in Dallas. Smoothie King, a top purpose-driven smoothie brand globally, is focused on promoting healthy and active lifestyles.
news.headline: Smoothie King appoints Gavin Felder as new president, expanding his leadership while serving as CFO. Leading growth era.

news.summary: NEUMÜNSTER, Germany, May 22, 2025 - Tilray Medical, a division of Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY and TSX: TLRY), a prominent player in medicinal cannabis globally, is introducing Good Supply in Germany. Good Supply, known for quality and affordability, is a top cannabis brand from Canada lauded for its range of cultivars. This launch aims to meet the changing medical cannabis scene by offering patients in Germany an inexpensive and dependable brand for their medical cannabis necessities.
news.headline: Tilray Medical introduces Good Supply cannabis brand to Germany, offering affordable and consistent quality to address medical cannabis needs.

news.summary: In a recent development, the O-RAN ALLIANCE has completed its seed funding program initiated in November of the year 2023. An advanced O-RAN Digital Twin platform has been introduced, facilitating easy lab deployment of O-RAN-based networks with just a few clicks. This innovative platform caters to the research community, aiming to expedite innovation within the industry.
news.headline: O-RAN ALLIANCE funded Digital Twin Platform to boost AI and Open RAN research. Lab deployment in few clicks. Seed funding initiative concluded in November 2023.

news.summary: Chicago, dated May 22, 2025 - Keeper Security has introduced a zero-trust privileged access management solution specifically designed for federal agencies. This solution is in line with U.S. government cybersecurity frameworks. Keeper Security is renowned for offering top-notch zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access solutions.
news.headline: Keeper Security's zero-trust privilege access solution is now on CISA's CDM approved list, aligning with US govt cybersecurity frameworks.

news.summary: In a significant move aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and upgrading security centers worldwide, CardinalOps, a leading unified threat exposure management firm, has revealed its new collaboration with SCSK Security. The strategic partnership between the two companies, announced on May 22, 2025, marks a pivotal step towards reducing global operational workloads and modernizing security operations centers. This partnership is expected to bring about notable improvements in security operations on an international scale.
news.headline: CardinalOps partners with SCSK Security to improve SIEM and cyber threat detection in Japan, reducing workload globally.

news.summary: A prestigious Asian gaming experience has been launched in Atlantic City, New Jersey at the Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa. The new offerings include a luxurious high-limit gaming area, the first high-limit bar in the market, sophisticated private gaming salons, and more. This grand launch took place on May 22, 2025, enhancing the city's gaming scene. Visitors can now enjoy an opulent gaming experience with exclusive features and amenities at the renowned Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa.
news.headline: Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa in Atlantic City unveils new gaming, dining, and bar experiences, including an Asian gaming area and high-limit bar.

news.summary: Lane42 Investment Partners, LLC, based in Santa Monica, California, recently announced the addition of new members to bring a wealth of experience to the team. The firm specializes in public and private market investments and has been operating since May 22, 2025. This move aims to leverage their collective expertise in navigating both sectors, further enhancing their ability to capitalize on opportunities.
news.headline: Lane42 Investment Partners appoints industry leaders to drive investment strategy in public and private markets. Founded in 2025, firm aims for strategic growth.

news.summary: Univar Solutions and Shandong Head Group have announced a strategic partnership to enhance pharmaceutical formulations using premium excipients for drug delivery systems. This global alignment, established on May 22, 2025, in Downers Grove, Illinois, and Zibo City, China, is dedicated to promoting sustainability, quality, and innovation. Both companies intend to leverage their expertise to drive advancements in pharmaceuticals, with a focus on delivering high-quality products to meet the growing demand in the market.
news.headline: Univar and Shandong Head Group form exclusive European partnership to boost supply of cellulose ethers and pharmaceutical excipients. Focus on sustainability and quality.HEAD>NNendo of the article.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Minneapolis, Jefferson Capital, Inc. declared the submission of a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities. Jefferson Capital is a prominent purchaser and manager of charged-off and insolvency consumer accounts, using analytical methods.
news.headline: Jefferson Capital files S-1 for IPO. Leading purchaser of charged-off consumer accounts.

news.summary: Main Street Capital Corporation (trading as MAIN on NYSE) has successfully invested a total of $42.5 million in the recent minority recapitalization of Doral Corporation. The investment was made to provide financial support for the restructuring of Doral Corporation. This strategic move showcases Main Street's commitment towards fostering growth and development in key industries.
news.headline: Main Street invests $42.5M in Doral Corporation for minority recapitalization. Another strategic move by Main Street.

news.summary: Anheuser-Busch's brewery in Houston has been recognized for its pioneering approach to water reuse with a prestigious honor. The project, implemented by Cambrian, a renowned company specializing in water reuse and energy recovery services, is a large-scale wastewater recovery initiative that has gained notable attention. This innovative model has set new standards in sustainability and received praise for its impactful measures. The distinguished honor highlights the brewery's commitment to implementing environmentally friendly practices and signifies a significant step towards a more sustainable future. The project's success showcases the potential for innovation in water reuse, with implications for similar initiatives across various industries.
news.headline: Cambrian and Anheuser-Busch win Global Water Award for Industrial Project of the Year in 2025 for innovative water recovery project at Houston brewery.

news.summary: Evolv, a prominent company specializing in advanced payment acceptance solutions, recently highlighted its continuing partnership with Valor PayTech, a top-notch point-of-sale technology provider. The collaboration between the two companies was established in September 2021 and has been flourishing since. This partnership showcases Evolv's commitment to innovation and enhancing payment processing technologies. The development is significant for both organizations as they work together to further elevate the POS industry. The news was released on May 22, 2025, marking a key milestone in their joint efforts.
news.headline: Evolv and Valor celebrate partnership, Evolv provides payment solutions, partnership started in Sept 2021.

news.summary: Blue Sky Uranium Corp. has successfully secured drill contractors, as announced on May 22, 2025. The company, listed on TSX Venture Exchange as BSK, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as MAL2, and OTCQB Venture Market as BKUCF, is moving forward with its exploration activities.
news.headline: Blue Sky Uranium plans drill program for Ivana Uranium-Vanadium Project on May 22, 2025. TSX: BSK FSE: MAL2 OTC: BKUCF.

news.summary: High 5 Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric has reported that a scarcity of skilled workers has resulted in increased wages, enhanced flexibility in scheduling, and an uptick in job vacancies. As of May 22, 2025, the family-owned and operated home service company has highlighted this trend, with a surge in available positions.
news.headline: High school seniors encouraged to consider skilled trades due to shortage of workers in the industry, leading to higher pay and more job openings.
